education.coursework: Web Programming, Data Structures, UX Design, Data Analytics

points: Managed the end-to-end participation lifecycle for competitive teams, serving as the primary technical point of contact regarding design specifications.
Ensured 100% data integrity and administrative accuracy for all submissions, effectively bridging the communication gap between participants and the judging panel.
Facilitated technical meetings and real-time troubleshooting, ensuring a seamless operational flow during the competition period.

projects.title: StudyChat PromptPace — Behavioral Classification & Analysis
bullets: Classified 16,851 student chatbot prompts into Answer-First and Explain-First categories using keyword-based rules to analyze help-seeking behavior.
Designed a simple blocking/pivot simulation system that detects answer-seeking prompts and suggests users rephrase for conceptual understanding.
Computed basic metrics (AFR, BE, EFAR) to measure the potential effect of the intervention, though actual user testing was not conducted.
Built a Python script to automate data processing and generate CSV reports and charts for academic documentation.

projects.title: BAPAK BAKERY E-CATALOG & INTEGRATED CMS
bullets: Architected a decoupled E-Catalog system using React.js for the frontend interface and FilamentPHP (Laravel) as the headless CMS backend.
Engineered RESTful API endpoints to synchronize real-time product inventory, pricing updates, and category management between the CMS and the client-side catalog.
Optimized database queries and asset delivery to ensure high-performance rendering of product catalogs across various devices.

projects.title: CSBD Classification using EEG — Logistic Regression Pipeline
projects.tech: Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, JSON
bullets: Built a Logistic Regression model to detect Compulsive Sexual Behavior Disorder from EEG data (AUC 0.842, Accuracy 76%) using ANOVA feature selection and 80K-fold validation.
Automated end-to-end reporting pipeline exporting JSON metrics, ROC curves, and stability plots.

projects.title: LAPOR VISUAL | UX RESEARCH & SOLUTION
projects.tech: Figma, User Journey Mapping, Data Viz
bullets: Presented an evidence-based design proposal at SisfoFest 2025, centered on optimizing civic interaction within smart city ecosystems.
Leveraged deep UX research methodologies to solve complex urban reporting challenges, transforming raw citizen data into actionable visual insights.
Designed high-fidelity prototypes that streamline the reporting process, significantly reducing user friction and enhancing data clarity for municipal stakeholders.

skills.languages: JavaScript (ES6+), PHP, Python, SQL, HTML5, CSS3
skills.tools: React.js, Laravel, FilamentPHP, Node.js, Docker, Nginx, Git, GitHub, Pandas, Matplotlib

certificates.name: Cloud and Gen AI Foundations on AWS
